title: JetBrains security advisory (AV26-709)
description: On July 14, 2026, JetBrains published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in multiple products. Included were critical updates for the following products:
products: JetBrains IntelliJ IDEA  versions prior to 2026.1.4 and 2026.2
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
